title: Damage Sensor
description: Defines what events to call when this entity is damaged by specific entities or items. Can be either an array or a single instance.

cause.description: Type of damage that triggers this set of events.

deals_damage.description: If true, the damage dealt to the entity will take off health from it. Set to false to make the entity ignore that damage.

on_damage.description: List of triggers with the events to call when taking this specific kind of damage. Allows specifying filters for entity definitions and events.
